org.apache.paimon.catalog

Class FileSystemCatalog

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.catalog.AbstractCatalog
      • org.apache.paimon.catalog.FileSystemCatalog
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    AutoCloseable, Catalog

    public class FileSystemCatalog
extends AbstractCatalog
    A catalog implementation for FileIO.

    • Method Detail

      • lockFactory

        public Optional<CatalogLock.Factory> lockFactory()
        Description copied from interface: Catalog
        Get lock factory from catalog. Lock is used to support multiple concurrent writes on the object store.

      • listDatabases

        public List<String> listDatabases()
        Description copied from interface: Catalog
        Get the names of all databases in this catalog.
        Returns:
        a list of the names of all databases
